item.title: Hurl
item.description:
Project Proposal

Project Objectives

Objective1 To develop a general training framework for novices to teach robots procedural tasks, which will be adaptable to various types of skills;

Objective2 To integrate instructional awareness support considering what (robot status and instructional plan) and how (nonverbal, dashboard, or AR) information can be made accessible to the trainer in a timely and adequate manner without increasing cognitive load

Objective3 To integrate instructional preparations via (1) a scripting tool for the trainer to prepare the instructional sequence and (2) a simulation framework allowing the human to test their lessons on simulated robots

Objective4 To investigate how gamification can leverage human engagement and robot skill transfer

Objective5 To explore gamified interaction in which the trainer gains to be adversarial (competitive scenario) or gains to be assistive (collaborative scenario)

Objective6 To evaluate the different approaches in two real-world scenarios (i.e. sorting groceries and cleaning table) with novice users, advancing knowledge, and providing guidelines for the design of human-centered robot training tools.

Project Schedule

https://quire.io/w/HURL/9/O1_-_General_Training_Framework_for_Novices?view=timeline
